title: kickxia spuria subsp. integrifolia
intro: Kickxia spuria subsp. integrifolia, also known as small red rattle or small red fumitory, is a rare, perennial plant in the gentian family that is native to Europe. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Kickxia spuria subsp. integrifolia include its ability to treat gastrointestinal issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its roots can be used to make a powder for topical application, showcasing its potential as a herbal remedy.
